data.name: NSFWare
data.detailed_description:
NSFWare is a series of two dozen minigames rotoscoped over actual pornographic content.
Play alone or with your friends and try to get the highest score.

NSFWare has been praised by its players and by the critic and showcased during various events.

Play with the arrow keys. Press R to restart and Echap to quit.

Features :
-Twerking
-Pole dancing
-Sexting
-Fingering
-Female Masturbation
-Edging
-Rimming
-Spit-roasting
-Fellation
-Threesome
-Foursome
-Creampie
-Spanking
-Bareback
-Stripping
-Tickling
-Cuckholding
-Riding
-Pegging
-Peeping
-S&M

data.reviews:
“The fun isn’t always in getting it right, but in getting it wrong together—jamming your fingers on all the keys and yelling I don’t know what I’m supposed to do to make you come but I’ll keep trying!”
Kotaku

“No matter who you are, or what you like, there's something for everyone to enjoy in NSFWare. And that's kind of beautiful.”
Mashable

“This game makes a strong case for sex as craftsmanship: it's not how impressive or advanced your tool is, it's more about how you use it.”
9/10 – Robert Yang

最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Core(TM) i5 CPU 2.4GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel(R) HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 290 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: /
  • 備註: /
